Title: User registration with valid data
Test Data:
- username: testuser1
- email: testuser1@example.com
- password: testpassword1
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter the test user data.
3. Click the "Register" button.

Title: User registration with invalid email format
Test Data:
- username: testuser2
- email: testuser2
- password: testpassword2
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter the test user data with an invalid email format.
3. Click the "Register" button.
Expected Result: The registration fails due to an invalid email format.

Title: User registration with existing username
Preconditions: User with the same username is already registered
Test Data:
- username: testuser3
- email: testuser3@example.com
- password: testpassword3
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter the test user data with an existing username.
3. Click the "Register" button.
Expected Result: The registration fails due to an existing username.

Title: User login with valid credentials
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the test user credentials.
3. Click the "Login" button.

Title: User login with invalid credentials
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the test user credentials with an invalid password.
3. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: The login fails due to invalid credentials.

Title: Viewing products
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the products page.
2. Verify that the products are displayed correctly.

Title: Adding a product to the cart
Preconditions: User is logged in and products are displayed
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the products page.
2. Select a product to add to the cart.
3. Click the "Add to Cart" button.
Expected Result: The product is added to the cart.

Title: Removing a product from the cart
Preconditions: User is logged in, a product is in the cart
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the cart page.
2. Select the product to remove from the cart.
3. Click the "Remove" button.
Expected Result: The product is removed from the cart.

Title: Checking out with valid payment information
Preconditions: User is logged in, a product is in the cart
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the checkout page.
2. Enter valid payment information.
3. Click the "Checkout" button.

Title: Checking out with invalid payment information
Preconditions: User is logged in, a product is in the cart
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the checkout page.
2. Enter invalid payment information.
3. Click the "Checkout" button.
Expected Result: The checkout fails due to invalid payment information.

Title: Server handling user registration
Test Steps:
1. Send a registration request from the client.
2. Verify that the request is processed correctly.

Title: Server handling user login
Test Steps:
1. Send a login request from the client.
2. Verify that the request is processed correctly.

Title: Server handling product updates
Test Steps:
1. Send a request to update a product.
2. Verify that the request is processed correctly.

Title: Database handling user registration
Test Steps:
1. Receive a registration request from the server.
2. Verify that the request is stored correctly.

Title: Database handling user login
Test Steps:
1. Receive a login request from the server.
2. Verify that the request is stored correctly.

Title: Database handling product updates
Test Steps:
1. Receive a request to update a product from the server.
2. Verify that the request is stored correctly.
